component.name: Mailwoman
component.summary: Web-first mail, calendar, tasks and contacts — thin native shell

description.p: Mailwoman is a web-first mail, calendar, tasks and contacts client. The desktop shell is a thin native wrapper (Tauri v2) around the same web app the server serves, adding OS integration — native notifications, OS keychain, default mailto handler, share targets, badge counts, biometric app-lock — and an optional self-contained local server for users with no server to deploy.
No protocol logic lives in the shell; it is a verified UI bundle only.
1.0-hardening baseline: accessibility, i18n, performance and packaging.
